page_content:
MUSC454 Jazz Improvisation II (3 Credits) Continuation of MUSC453 including scoring and transcription. Prerequisite: MUSC453; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department. And permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Credit Only Granted for: MUSC346 or MUSC454. Formerly: MUSC346.

MUSC444 Wind and Percussion Literature (1 Credit) Recital program notes and written projects in wind or percussion literature. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Corequisite: MUSP420 or MUSP419.

MUSC445 Survey of the Opera (3 Credits) A study of the music, librettos and composers of the standard operas. Prerequisite: MUSC330 and MUSC331; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

MUSC446 String Literature (1 Credit) Recital program notes and written projects in string literature. Prerequisite: MUSP316; and permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

MUSC448 Selected Topics in Music (1-3 Credits) Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
